text:
First, note that in 1715, Asia/Shanghai used LMT (UTC+08:05:43) and Europe/London used LMT (UTC−00:01:15) before standardization.  
UTC offset difference ≈ 8 hours 7 minutes.  
2:00 AM Shanghai → subtract 8h 7m → 5:53 PM previous day (May 13, 1715) in London LMT.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1715-05-13 17:53
